/home/runner/work/ezLibs/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzBinBuf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzBmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzFileWatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzGif.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzPng.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzSvg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzVdbWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzVoxWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/TestEzXmlConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestFile.dir/main.cpp.o -o EzLibs_TestFile
